description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet or shelving unit with a dark brown finish. The front features a combination of open shelves on the left, two open cubbies at the top right, a large open compartment below them, and a pair of doors with a vertical handle in the lower right section. The left side of the unit is composed of four open slatted shelves, providing both storage and display space. The back and right sides are solid panels, while the legs are slender and slightly elevated, giving the piece a modern, airy appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional layout suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden cabinet with open slatted shelves on one side, cubbies, and a pair of doors, featuring a modern, minimalist design. The unit combines open and closed storage, making it versatile for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing open slatted shelves on the left, two cubbies and a large open compartment on the right, and a pair of doors below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid panel construction and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible shelves or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel and the slatted shelves on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the four open slatted shelves and the open structure of the left side.

license_info.creator_display_name: 杭州维界科技有限公司
